{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220620395B4650BA378DF3482174\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587413034311861054","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"天才科学家，科研造星际路"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766584908,"group_id":"7578968239472921662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哦漏吴中盛文史温柔抑郁症婆婆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyLI30Ysgix9yDRSA8tpdOiVBDWr657NPT/dnv0FT4RC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1452879095280052","user_name":"用户14528790"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1452879095280052","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578968239472921662","book_info":{"abstract":"天才科学家陆星沉因拒绝为豪门继承人作假学术报告，被污蔑学术造假并逐出国家重点实验室。陆星沉并未消沉，她在废弃旧仓库建立私人研究室，在没有系统、没有金手指的情况下，凭借其过人的物理直觉和工程能力，攻克常温超导、微型核聚变等世界级难题。随着一件件跨时代科技产品的问世，曾经打压她的势力相继破产，全球各国为争夺她的科研成果不惜开出通天价码，她最终带领人类跨入星际文明。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2e1c2f1ee5e10f3d3b81409d1c796353~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"老汉丶憨憨","author_id":"","book_id":"7578968239472921662","book_name":"天才科学家，科研造星际路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101028","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon
